design_philosophy: Marketplace Command Center. A premium, high-conversion lead generation machine utilizing 2026 'Liquid Glass' UI principles, brutalist typography scales, and immersive 3D data visualization. Not a standard agency site—this is a 24/7 digital sales representative.

hierarchy.h1_hero: font-heading text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-[1.05]
hierarchy.h2_section: font-heading text-3xl md:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.body_lg: font-body text-lg md:text-xl font-normal leading-relaxed text-opacity-80
hierarchy.metrics: font-numbers text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight to tracking-tighter).
Numbers and statistics must exclusively use Space Grotesk to enforce the 'analytics' vibe.
Never center align body paragraphs; use left-alignment for crisp reading logic.
Hero section MUST be deep dark (#0B1220) to make the 3D graphics and 'Liquid Glass' form pop.
Below-the-fold sections transition to light (#F8FAFC) to enforce a high-end editorial feel.
Use #2563EB (Electric Blue) exclusively for primary CTAs and magnetic hover states.
Use #22C55E (Growth Green) specifically for positive metrics, checkmarks, and revenue charts.

visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Electric blue ambient shadows for the hero CTA button: shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(37,99,235,0.4)]
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px translucent borders to define edges without adding visual weight.

components.name: Premium Loader
components.description: Absolute full screen dark (#0B1220), animated 'AC' monogram, elegant thin progress bar, smooth fade out using Framer Motion.

components.name: Sticky Navigation
components.description: fixed top-0 w-full z-50. Starts transparent over the dark hero. On scroll past hero, switches to Light Mode Glass (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 text-slate-900).

components.name: 3D Marketplace Command Center (Hero)
components.description: React Three Fiber canvas in background. Floating UI cards showing abstracted revenue growth (green line charts) and 3D geometric nodes (particles/connections). MUST have a dark overlay bg-[#0B1220]/60 to ensure the form and text remain legible.

components.name: Hero Glass Lead Form
components.description: The crown jewel. Uses 'dark_mode' glassmorphism. Inputs have transparent bg (bg-white/5), white text, white/20 border. Focus rings in Accent blue. Primary CTA button in solid Accent blue with glow.

components.name: Trust Bar
components.description: Light background (#F8FAFC). Large animated counters using Space Grotesk. Flex layout with vertical dividers (border-slate-200).

components.name: Why Choose Us Bento Grid
components.description: Tetris grid layout. Mix of col-span-4, col-span-8. Cards use 'light_mode' glass/solid white. Hover effects: slight Y-translate, border darkens to slate-300.

rules: Ensure grid items have different row and col spans to create tension and asymmetry.
Padding inside bento cards must be generous (p-8 to p-12).

layouts.spacing_scale: Use 2x normal spacing. Sections must have py-24 or py-32.
layouts.hero: min-h-screen relative flex items-center pt-24 pb-16 overflow-hidden

interactions: Smooth Scrolling: Initialize Lenis for premium scroll weight.
Magnetic Buttons: Use framer-motion to slightly pull primary CTAs toward mouse cursor on hover.
Text Reveal: Hero headline should use staggered character or word reveal on load.
Card Tilt: Subtle 3D tilt effect on 'Why Choose Us' cards using onPointerMove.

3d_libraries.implementation_notes: Use <Float> and <Environment> from drei. Build an abstract data node network or floating glass analytic cards. Keep the mesh materials dark/translucent to not overpower the lead form. Wrap canvas in <Suspense>.

hero_abstract_glass.description: Abstract wavy blue 3D glass texture (fallback if R3F fails or as loading texture)

office_meeting.description: Premium modern office conference room (use for About/Contact background or mask)

accessibility.contrast: Text over hero 3D canvas MUST have adequate text-shadow or a dark overlay underneath. Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds where text readability is compromised.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements, forms, and key text must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import Satoshi, Inter, and Space Grotesk from Google Fonts / Fontsource.
instructions_to_main_agent.hero_implementation: The hero section is critical. Split it visually: 50% left for typography (Headline, Subhead, Trust badges) and 50% right for the 'Liquid Glass' Lead Capture Form. The 3D R3F Canvas should sit behind both, filling the screen.
instructions_to_main_agent.form: The lead form is not just a UI component, it's the core business objective. Style the inputs flawlessly with focus states. Provide a success state (toast or inline) upon submission.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Do not use emojis for icons. Use lucide-react. E.g., <TrendingUp />, <BarChart />, <ShieldCheck />.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Do not make generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add specific transitions.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is strictly forbidden).
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with magnetic or glow hover states.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
NEVER use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image_urls.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡) for icons.
